user.title: Connect to SAM
user.description: Configure the connection to your Solace broker. The SAM Web UI URL is only needed if you want to use SAM as your TTS/STT provider.

data.mqtt_port: MQTT Port (8883 for TLS, 1883 for plain)
data.sam_url: SAM Web UI URL (optional, for TTS/STT — e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8000)

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the broker — check your hostname, port, credentials, and TLS setting.

init.title: SAM Workflows Settings
init.description: Update connection settings. Changes take effect immediately after saving.

data.mqtt_port: MQTT Port (8883 for TLS, 1883 for plain)
data.sam_url: SAM Web UI URL (optional, for TTS/STT — e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8000)

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the broker — check your hostname, port, credentials, and TLS setting.
